name: POST /api/v1/auth/verification/verify/ - noto'g'ri verification_token
description: Maqsad: Noto'g'ri verification_token bilan xato qaytarishini tekshirish

@pytest.fixture(scope="class")
    def verification_token():
        """
        OTP yuborib verification_token qaytaradi.
        Agar aktiv kod mavjud bo'lsa (409), verify endpoint'dan token oladi.
        """
        with allure.step("Fixture: verification_token olish"):
            url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/auth/verification/"
            payload = {
                "contact": "+998888672005",
                "contact_type": 1,
                "method": 2,
                "action": 1
            }
            resp = requests.post(url, json=payload)
    
            if resp.status_code in [200, 201]:
                token = resp.json().get("verification_token")
                assert token, f"verification_token olinmadi: {resp.json()}"
                return token
            elif resp.status_code == 409:
                # Aktiv kod bor — oldingi test yuborgan tokenni ishlatamiz
                # verify endpointga noto'g'ri kod yuborib, xato responsedagi tokenni olamiz
                # Yoki to'g'ridan-to'g'ri conftest'dagi get_verification_token ni ishlatamiz
                # Bu holda test environment tozalanishini kutish kerak
                pytest.skip(
                    "Aktiv OTP mavjud (409). Server'dagi aktiv kod tugashini kuting (~2-5 daqiqa), "
                    "keyin qayta ishga tushiring."
                )
            else:
